gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Playback" tab within the overrides page
And the user clicks on the "Create Override" button
And the user type in and Okta ID in the "OktaId" box
And the user selects "Client Type" from the Client Type dropdown
And the user selects "Experience" from the Experience dropdown
And the user selects "Features" from the Features dropdown
And the user clicks on the "Save" button
Then the user should see the Playback page
And the user should see "Create Override" popup on the screen
And the user should see the Okta ID entered information in "OktaId" box
And the user should see the selected "Client Type" in the dropdown
And the user should see the selected "Experiences" in the dropdown
And the user should see the "Features" in the dropdown
And the user should see  "Playback Override successfully created"
!xray-attachment://a6082a9d-cb02-4bee-8256-49c7999b3e48|width=418,height=93!

steps.action:
*When* the user clicks on the "Playback" tab within the overrides page

*And* the user clicks on the "Create Override" button

*And* the user type in and Okta ID in the "OktaId" box

*And* the user selects "Client Type" from the Client Type dropdown

*And* the user selects "Experience" from the Experience dropdown

*And* the user selects "Features" from the Features dropdown

*And* the user clicks on the "Save" button
steps.result:
*Then* the user should see the Playback page

*And* the user should see "Create Override" popup on the screen

*And* the user should see the Okta ID entered information in "OktaId" box

*And* the user should see the selected "Client Type" in the dropdown

*And* the user should see the selected "Experiences" in the dropdown

*And* the user should see the "Features" in the dropdown

*And* the user should see  "Playback Override successfully created"

!xray-attachment://a6082a9d-cb02-4bee-8256-49c7999b3e48|width=418,height=93!
